title: Minecraft Dumb Ideas (MDI)
description:
Ever wanted to throw bricks at villagers, drink Redbull and levitate, or brew the world’s longest-named Starbucks drink from a custom coffee machine?

No?

Well too bad. This mod adds that — and a whole lot of regret.
body:
# MDI

## Dependencies:
- Minecraft
- Forge 1.20.1


Nothing else just these....

## Put your ideas in our next mod ↓

[Contact us](https://www.instagram.com/redresso2)

## Description:
Ever wanted to throw bricks at villagers, drink Redbull and levitate, or brew the world’s longest-named Starbucks drink from a custom coffee machine?

No?

Well too bad. This mod adds that — and a whole lot of regret.

### 🧪 Features:
The Pipe – Eat it. Hear it clank. That's it.

Dumb-bells – Lift. Buff. Regret.

Sour Potch Kids – Crafted from 9 sugar. Screams when eaten.

Redball – Gives you wings... and levitation.

Glue – Slows you down. What did you expect? It’s glue.

The Brick – Throwable. Bonks mobs. Makes a boing.

Monobloc Chair – Looks like furniture. Lies like one too.

Coffee Maker – Makes coffee. Turns villagers into Starbucks employees. Sells drinks with names longer than your attention span.

Villager Rage System – Hit a villager? Prepare to run. They fight back. They jump. They want revenge.

Flesh Drop – Angry villagers drop “flesh.” It’s not food. It only burns. And so will your conscience.

Anvil Drop on 'O' – Just press it. You'll see.

Boom on 'Z' - Don't believe me, try it yourself

Molotov - Wierd glitchy thing that works sometimes and sometimes not

Coffee Cup - A cup to fill your coffee duh!

Filled Coffee Cup - Obtained when using a Coffee cup on the coffee maker, you eat the coffee intead of drinking it.

and maybe more...



### Credits:
Shopping Cart:
"Shopping cart" by Justinorange
Available for download at https://blockmodels.com.com/model/763/

Molotov: 
"Molotov Cocktail (for some reason the UV aren't placed right, but ingame they are)" by Gengar: https://www.youtube.com/@Twoneight/videos
Available for download at https://blockmodels.com.com/model/516/

Idea:
Starbucks Villager & Long-named drink: Knarfy
